calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-30-2011 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-21-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Norman Lew for Eugenia Ng.

Mr. Lew stated that his office prepared the will and trust for Ms. Gee, that the Daughter In Law had control/possession of the documents, that Mr. Wong took the documents to the financial institution and returned them to Ying Wong, that she believed she returned to his office, but that they had not located them. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court). The will was admitted.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
